feature.title: Mission Feed Saved Views and Playback
feature.purpose: Upgrade the global Mission Feed into a reusable, replayable company timeline with browser-local saved lenses and source-lane drilldown.

research.name: Saved Filter Sets
research.takeaway: Saved filter configurations should be quickly reusable for repeated collection views.

research.name: Saved Views
research.takeaway: Saved views let operators preserve common dashboard filter combinations and restore them with one click.

research.name: Activity Feed
research.takeaway: Activity feeds should aggregate events in order while keeping event source, type, time, and detail visible.

research.name: Session Replay Timeline
research.takeaway: Replay surfaces benefit from a scrubbable timeline with synchronized contextual panels.

interactions: Apply default feed lenses for all events, gates, evidence, outcomes, and traces.
Save the current feed filter as a browser-local lens.
Persist selected feed filter and saved lenses across page reloads.
Reset browser-local saved feed lenses back to defaults.
Replay the filtered feed with previous, play/pause, and next controls.
Open the playback event source lane Trail view.
implementation.safetyBoundary: The feature only reads snapshot.missionFeed and browser-local preferences. It does not mutate the control plane, send messages, or start workers.
